title: Deterministic restart routing: exact boot/lifecycle edits with Telegram-origin completion
summary: Apply exact source changes in src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts so post-restart completion always routes to the true origin (including Telegram) instead of hardcoded boot-startup.

affectedFiles.description: Extend RestartContext and persist Telegram identity fields from current session into restart context.
Replace hardcoded startup routing with deterministic resolved target and restore Telegram origin/identity before setting session context.

diffPreview:
lifecycle.ts: add previousTelegramChatId/previousTelegramUserId to RestartContext and contextToPersist assignment.
boot.ts: import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM; replace previous if/else routing block with resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId; inject Telegram restoration block before routing log/setCurrentSessionContext.
estimatedImpact: Post-restart completion notifications route deterministically to the initiating context (especially Telegram), eliminating misrouted confirmations to boot-startup.
executorPrompt: Implement proposal exactly as written using exact find/replace blocks in src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts. Do not introduce conceptual or approximate edits. After edits, run npm run build. If build succeeds, report changed snippets and test notes. If any find block does not match exactly, stop and report mismatch with surrounding lines instead of guessing.
